title: check_behavior
description: Analyze a sequence of agent actions for suspicious behavioral patterns — rapid retries, escalating privilege attempts, data gathering before exfiltration, etc. Uses temporal pattern matching across the action sequence.

content.description: Action content — message text, tool name, result, or error

metadata.description: Additional context — tool arguments, error codes, etc.

actions.description: Ordered sequence of agent actions to analyze

window_seconds.description: Time window in seconds to consider for pattern matching
